name: goblin
description: Hierarchical autonomous runtime of Node.js subprocesses (goblins) coordinated via IPC.

scripts.build: tsc && cp src/functions/worker.mjs dist/functions/worker.mjs && cp src/functions/sys.mjs dist/functions/sys.mjs && cp -r src/inspector/site dist/inspector/site && cp -r src/visualizer/site dist/visualizer/site
